rows.field_68917: Improving access to primary healthcare in underserved regions.
Developing online resources for K-12 education in low-income areas.
Installing sustainable water filtration systems in rural communities.
Supporting startups focused on AI for social good.
Empowering local NGOs with capacity building and funding.

rows.field_68927: Build and equip primary healthcare clinics in target underserved regions.
Create a scalable digital platform with curriculum and interactive tools.
Deploy sustainable water filtration units to improve clean water access.
Provide mentorship, funding, and resources to AI-driven social impact startups.
Train and support NGOs with management, fundraising, and project execution skills.

rows.field_68932: Conduct surveys to identify optimal locations for primary healthcare clinics in target regions.
Create educational modules and interactive tools for the digital learning platform.
Deploy and test sustainable water filtration systems in selected rural communities.
Provide mentorship, resources, and seed funding to AI-driven social impact startups.
Run training sessions on management, fundraising, and project execution for local NGOs.

fields.name: Achievement Percentage
fields.formula: if(field('Target Value') > 0, (field('Current Total Value') / field('Target Value')) * 100, 0)

rows.field_68939: Total count of primary healthcare clinics constructed in target regions.
Number of unique users actively using the digital education platform each month.

rows.field_68937: Households with Access to Clean Water
